basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 7 Non-Teaching Posts, Applications Begin on June 1
basic_details.post_name: Registrar, Librarian, Assistant Librarian, Executive Engineer, Medical Officer, Technical Assistant
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved category candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Candidates should have a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade along with required administrative or academic experience. | Candidates must have a Master's Degree in Library Science, Information Science or Documentation with required marks and relevant experience. | Candidates should have a Master's Degree in Library Science, Information Science or Documentation Science with at least 60% marks and NET/SLET/SET qualification. | Candidates must have B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering with first class or equivalent grade from a recognized university or institute. | Candidates should have an MBBS degree or equivalent qualification and must be registered in a State Medical Register or Indian Medical Register. | Candidates should have B.E./B.Tech, MCA, Diploma in Engineering, Bachelor's Degree in Science or Master's Degree in Science as per the official eligibility rules.

how_to_apply: Visit the official recruitment portal of NIT Silchar.
Pay the application fee through SBI Collect.
Submit the form and download the application copy.
Send the hard copy with documents to NIT Silchar before July 15, 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for NIT Silchar Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 is 30 June 2026. Candidates must also send the hard copy of the application before 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NIT Silchar has announced 7 vacancies for various non-teaching posts, including Registrar, Librarian, Assistant Librarian, Executive Engineer, Medical Officer, and Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,200 for UR/OBC/EWS candidates and ₹600 for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for NIT Silchar Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Technical Assistant post should possess B.E./B.Tech, MCA, Diploma in Engineering, Bachelor's Degree in Science, or Master's Degree in Science as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NIT Silchar Non-Teaching Posts 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post. It is 56 years for Registrar and Librarian, 35 years for Assistant Librarian, Executive Engineer, and Medical Officer, and 30 years for Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NIT Silchar Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 will be conducted as per the institute's recruitment rules, which may include screening, written tests, interviews, or document verification depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. When does the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for NIT Silchar Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 started on 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered under NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salaries under different pay levels, including Level 14, Level 10, and Level 6 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission pay structure.
